concerns.text: Kickback concerns indicate T062 (Monte Carlo validation) and T026 (synthetic dataset generation) still contain [deferred] values instead of the required 10,000 replicates/summaries. FR-026 and FR-030 mandate these exact values. If tasks.md contains [deferred] markers for these tasks, the statistical validation requirements are not fully specified, undermining methodological rigor.

FR-026 requires Monte Carlo validation with 10,000 replicates for statistical test implementations, but the plan.md Scale/Scope section only specifies 10,000 synthetic summaries (FR-030). The 10,000 Monte Carlo replicates requirement is not explicitly stated in the plan's Scale/Scope section, though it appears in research.md. This creates ambiguity about whether the statistical validation approach is fully specified.
